active_concerns: pipeline.py lines 291-294 uncovered (discord elif branch not hit by test_pipeline.py — pipeline tests use file/stdout fixtures only; functional wiring verified by delivery tests)
config.py lines 117-119,126,164 — LLM/file-validation paths not changed by this PR, coverage regression negligible

terminology.2000-char limit: Discord max content per message, counted in Unicode chars not bytes
terminology.Discord host allowlist: config-load check: https + host in {discord.com,discordapp.com} — SSRF/mis-route guard
terminology.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL: default env var for the webhook secret; never in config file, never logged
terminology.Fatal push: push failure -> DeliveryError -> Error: stderr -> exit 1; ~10s timeout
terminology.Partial multi-message delivery: if message k of n fails, 1..k-1 already delivered; no rollback
